commands.name: exec
html

options.name: --cwd
options.description:
Working directory to use when invoking the
source CLI.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Preview the resolved render plan without
writing files.

options.name: --enable-nuget-browser
options.description:
Enable the NuGet package browser on the viewer
home screen.

options.name: --enable-package-upload
options.description:
Enable local package upload on the viewer home
screen.

options.name: --enable-url
options.description:
Allow the viewer to load OpenCLI inputs from
URL query parameters.

options.name: --include-hidden
options.description:
Include commands and options marked hidden by
the source CLI.

options.name: --include-metadata
options.description:
Include metadata sections in the rendered
Markdown or HTML output.

options.name: --json
options.description:
Emit the stable machine-readable JSON envelope
instead of human output.

options.name: --label
options.description:
Custom label shown in the viewer header (e.g.
a version string).

options.name: --no-color
options.description:
Disable ANSI color sequences in human-readable
console output.

options.name: --no-composer
options.description:
Hide the interactive command composer from the
generated HTML app.

options.name: --no-dark
options.description: Disable dark mode in the generated HTML app.

options.name: --no-light
options.description:
Disable light mode in the generated HTML
app.

options.name: --opencli-arg
options.description:
Override the arguments used to invoke the
source CLI's OpenCLI export command.

options.name: --out-dir
options.description:
Directory where the HTML app bundle should be
written.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Override the output mode. Supported values are
human and json.

options.name: --overwrite
options.description:
Allow existing output files or directories to
be replaced.

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Suppress non-essential console output.

options.name: --show-home
options.description:
Show the viewer home screen button in the
generated HTML app.

options.name: --source-arg
options.description:
Additional arguments passed directly to the
source executable before the export command.

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
Timeout in seconds for each export command
executed against the source CLI.

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Increase diagnostic detail in the rendered
summary output.

options.name: --with-xmldoc
options.description:
Also invoke the source CLI's cli xmldoc
command for XML enrichment.

options.name: --xmldoc-arg
options.description:
Override the arguments used to invoke the
source CLI's XML documentation export command.

arguments.name: SOURCE
arguments.description:
CLI executable or script to invoke for cli 
opencli exports.

commands.description:
Render an HTML app bundle from a live CLI process 
and optional `cli xmldoc` enrichment.

commands.description:
Render Markdown from a live CLI process and 
optional `cli xmldoc` enrichment.

Render docs by executing a CLI that exposes `cli 
opencli`.

commands.name: self

options.name: --enable-nuget-browser
options.description:
Enable the NuGet package browser on the
self-documentation viewer home screen.

options.name: --enable-package-upload
options.description:
Enable local package upload on the
self-documentation viewer home screen.

options.name: --enable-url
options.description:
Allow the viewer to load alternate OpenCLI inputs
from URL query parameters.

options.name: --include-hidden
options.description:
Include hidden commands and options from
InSpectra's own CLI surface.

options.name: --include-metadata
options.description:
Include metadata sections in the generated
Markdown tree and HTML bundle.

options.name: --label
options.description:
Custom label shown in the viewer header (e.g. a
version string).

options.name: --no-composer
options.description:
Hide the interactive command composer from the
generated self-documentation app.

options.name: --no-dark
options.description:
Disable dark mode in the generated
self-documentation app.

options.name: --no-light
options.description:
Disable light mode in the generated
self-documentation app.

options.name: --out-dir
options.description:
Directory where the self-documentation bundle
should be written.

options.name: --overwrite
options.description:
Allow existing self-documentation output to be
replaced.

options.name: --show-home
options.description:
Show the viewer home screen button in the
generated self-documentation app.

options.name: --skip-html
options.description: Skip generating the HTML app bundle under html/.

options.name: --skip-markdown
options.description:
Skip generating the Markdown tree output under
tree/.

commands.description:
Render documentation for InSpectra itself. Exports 
opencli.json, xmldoc.xml, Markdown tree, and HTML bundle.
